# lean.x digital

> lean.x digital (also written "Lean X Digital") is a digital marketing agency based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. We turn traffic into sales by combining brand, marketing, and an AI-powered sales engine into one seamless system.

## About
lean.x digital builds the full growth funnel — from brand and creative content, through full-funnel digital marketing (SEO, paid ads, and social), to an in-house AI sales system that converts traffic into booked, paying customers. Most agencies stop at attention; we build the part that actually pays. Primary website: https://leanxdigital.io (also https://leanx.io).

## Services
- **Brand & Creative** — brand identity, positioning, content, photography & video, campaigns, print & collateral.
- **Digital Marketing** — SEO, Google Ads, Meta Ads, social media, content, and analytics working as one demand engine across the funnel.
- **AI Sales Systems** — high-converting landing pages, sales funnels, AI automation, conversion optimization, lead capture, and booking systems, built on our own platform.

## Industries served
Automotive, Education, Property, Technology, Food & Beverage, Professional Services, Healthcare, Manufacturing, Retail, Finance — plus SMEs, startups, and enterprise.

## Contact
